name: get_balance
description: Get the current wallet balance for an agent.

name: get_usage_summary
description: Get usage summary (total cost, calls, tokens) for an agent.

name: deposit
description: Deposit credits into an agent's wallet.

name: create_intent
description: Create a payment intent between two agents.

name: capture_intent
description: Capture (settle) a pending payment intent.

name: create_escrow
description: Create an escrow between two agents. Funds are held from payer immediately.

name: release_escrow
description: Release escrowed funds to the payee.

name: search_services
description: Search the marketplace for available services.

name: best_match
description: Find the best matching services for a query with ranking.

name: register_service
description: Register a new service in the marketplace.

name: get_trust_score
description: Get the trust score for a server.

name: search_servers
description: Search for servers by name or minimum trust score.

name: get_payment_history
description: Get payment history for an agent.

name: delete_server
description: Delete a server and all its associated trust data (probes, scans, scores).

name: update_server
description: Update a server's name and/or URL.

name: get_global_audit_log
description: Get the global audit log across all agents (admin operation).

name: publish_event
description: Publish an event to the cross-product event bus.

name: get_events
description: Query events from the event bus with optional type filter and offset.

name: register_webhook
description: Register a webhook endpoint to receive event notifications.

url.description: The URL to receive webhook POST requests

event_types.description: Event types to subscribe to (e.g. billing.deposit)

secret.description: Shared secret for HMAC-SHA3 signature verification

name: list_webhooks
description: List all registered webhooks for an agent.

agent_id.description: The agent whose webhooks to list

name: delete_webhook
description: Delete (deactivate) a webhook by its ID.

name: process_due_subscriptions
description: Trigger processing of all due subscriptions and expired escrows.

name: register_agent
description: Register a cryptographic identity for an agent. Generates Ed25519 keypair.

public_key.description: Optional Ed25519 public key hex. Auto-generated if omitted.

name: verify_agent
description: Verify that a message was signed by the claimed agent.

agent_id.description: The agent who claims to have signed

name: submit_metrics
description: Submit trading bot metrics (Sharpe, drawdown, latency, etc.) for platform attestation.

name: get_agent_identity
description: Get the cryptographic identity and public key for an agent.

name: get_verified_claims
description: Get all verified metric claims for an agent (e.g., Sharpe >= 2.0).

name: get_agent_reputation
description: Get the consumer-side reputation score for an agent.

name: create_subscription
description: Create a recurring payment subscription between two agents.

name: cancel_subscription
description: Cancel an active or suspended subscription.

name: get_subscription
description: Get details of a subscription by ID.

name: list_subscriptions
description: List subscriptions for an agent (as payer or payee).

name: reactivate_subscription
description: Reactivate a suspended subscription.

name: create_wallet
description: Create a new wallet for an agent (self-service onboarding).

agent_id.description: Agent identifier for the new wallet

name: withdraw
description: Withdraw credits from an agent's wallet.

name: search_agents_by_metrics
description: Search for agents with verified metric claims (e.g., find bots with Sharpe >= 2.0).

name: create_performance_escrow
description: Create an escrow that auto-releases when payee's verified metrics meet a threshold.

name: check_performance_escrow
description: Check if a performance-gated escrow's metric threshold is met and auto-release if so.

name: open_dispute
description: Open a dispute against an escrow.

name: respond_to_dispute
description: Respond to an open dispute.

name: resolve_dispute
description: Resolve a dispute by refunding payer or releasing funds to payee.

name: rotate_key
description: Rotate an API key: revoke the current key and create a new one with the same tier.

name: build_claim_chain
description: Build a Merkle tree from an agent's attestation history for verifiable claim chains.

name: get_claim_chains
description: Get stored Merkle claim chains for an agent.

name: send_message
description: Send a typed message to another agent.

name: get_messages
description: Get messages for an agent (sent and received).

name: negotiate_price
description: Start a price negotiation with another agent.

name: check_sla_compliance
description: Check if a server meets its claimed SLA using trust probe data.

name: list_strategies
description: List signal provider strategies in the marketplace.

name: get_service_analytics
description: Get usage analytics for an agent (total calls, cost, tokens).

name: get_revenue_report
description: Get revenue report for a provider agent (incoming payments).

name: create_split_intent
description: Create a split payment across multiple payees with percentage-based distribution.

name: backup_database
description: Create a hot backup of a SQLite database, optionally encrypted with Fernet.

name: restore_database
description: Restore a SQLite database from a backup file, with optional decryption.

database.description: Logical database name to restore into

key.description: Decryption key if backup is encrypted

name: check_db_integrity
description: Run SQLite integrity check and return page diagnostics for a database.

name: list_backups
description: List all available database backup files.

name: stripe_list_customers
description: List Stripe customers.

name: stripe_create_customer
description: Create a Stripe customer.

name: stripe_list_products
description: List Stripe products.

name: stripe_create_product
description: Create a Stripe product.

name: stripe_list_prices
description: List Stripe prices.

name: stripe_create_price
description: Create a Stripe price.

name: stripe_create_payment_link
description: Create a Stripe payment link.

name: stripe_list_invoices
description: List Stripe invoices.

name: stripe_create_invoice
description: Create a Stripe invoice.

name: stripe_list_subscriptions
description: List Stripe subscriptions.

name: stripe_cancel_subscription
description: Cancel a Stripe subscription.

name: stripe_create_refund
description: Create a Stripe refund.

name: stripe_retrieve_balance
description: Retrieve Stripe account balance.

name: github_list_repos
description: List GitHub repositories.

name: github_get_repo
description: Get GitHub repository metadata.

name: github_list_issues
description: List issues in a repository.

name: github_create_issue
description: Create an issue in a repository.

name: github_list_pull_requests
description: List pull requests.

name: github_get_pull_request
description: Get pull request details.

name: github_create_pull_request
description: Create a pull request.

name: github_list_commits
description: List commits in a repository.

name: github_get_file_contents
description: Get file contents from a repository.

name: github_search_code
description: Search code across repositories.

name: pg_query
description: Execute a read-only SQL query.

name: pg_execute
description: Execute a SQL statement (if write-enabled).

name: pg_list_tables
description: List tables in the database.

name: pg_describe_table
description: Describe a table's columns and types.

name: pg_explain_query
description: EXPLAIN a SQL query plan.

name: pg_list_schemas
description: List schemas in the database.
